text:
Goldie loved walking in the forest.
Today, she found a path she'd never seen before.
"Hmm? Where does this lead?"

At the end of the path was the cutest little cottage!
The door was open, and something smelled delicious inside.
Goldie couldn't help herself. She tiptoed in.

On the table sat three bowls of porridge — a big one, a medium one, and a tiny one.
Goldie tasted the big bowl.
"Ow ow ow! This one is too HOT!"

She tasted the medium bowl.
"Brrr! This one is too COLD!"

She tasted the tiny bowl.
"This one is…  just right!"
Goldie ate it all up. Every last drop!

In the living room, Goldie found three chairs.
She sat in the big chair.
"Ouch! This one is too HARD!"

She sat in the medium chair.
"Whoa! This one is too SOFT!"
She sank right in and could barely get out!

She sat in the tiny chair.
"This one is…  just right!"
But she wiggled and wobbled and—
CRACK!  The chair broke!

Upstairs, Goldie found three beds.
She climbed onto the big bed.
"Whew! This one is too HIGH!"

She tried the medium bed.
"Ugh! This one is too SMALL!"
Her feet stuck right out the end!

She lay down in the tiny bed.
"This one is… just… right…"
And just like that, Goldie fell fast asleep. Zzzzzz.

The door opened. The three bears were home!
Papa Bear rumbled… "Who's been eating MY porridge?"
Mama Bear gasped… "Who broke MY chair?"
Baby Bear ran upstairs and squealed — "Someone's in MY bed!"

Goldie woke up and saw three bears staring at her.
"AAAH! I'm so sorry! I'm so so sorry!"
"I shouldn't have come into your house without asking!"

Mama Bear smiled…  "It's okay, dear. Just knock next time!"
Baby Bear tugged on Goldie's dress… "Come play with me again!"
Goldie waved goodbye… "I will! And I'll bring yummy porridge!"
And from that day on… Goldie and the three bears became the best of friends.
